verdict: FRONTIER (death-trigger 2): Stage A reproduces SU(3) confinement on the cubic lattice (Creutz chi(2,2)>0, decreasing with weaker coupling = asymptotic freedom). Confinement on the causet stays [FRONTIER], as for U(1) in E5/E7. The Paper SU3's cubic-only confinement scope is CORRECT and stands (no downgrade; frontier documented).
